privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the agent to configure three keyword bookmarks for OSINT tools exactly as specified in the instructions. The expected folder name is "OSINT Search Tools". The expected bookmarks must match the specific names (Ahmia Onion Search, DuckDuckGo Private, Wayback Machine Lookup), exact URL patterns (ahmia.fi/search/?q=%s, duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/?q=%s, web.archive.org/web/*/%s), and associated keywords (@ahmia, @ddg, @archive). The DuckDuckGo Onion address has been verified as its canonical v3 address, and the Ahmia and Wayback URL structures were verified as valid for query substitution.
